ddls:
CREATE TABLE "production_costs" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost entry */,
  "cost_type" TEXT /* Type of production cost (e.g., Variable Cost, Fixed Cost) */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost associated with the type */,
  "production_activity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the production activity */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of crop */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the cost entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the cost entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_costs_production_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_activity_id") REFERENCES production_entries ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_costs_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variable_costs" (
  "variable_cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variable cost entry */,
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the overall cost entry */,
  "cost_description" TEXT /* Description of the variable cost */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unit of measurement for the variable cost */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the variable cost */,
  "rate" REAL /* Rate per unit of the variable cost */,
  "subtotal" REAL /* Subtotal cost for the variable cost */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the variable cost entry */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments for the variable cost */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variable_costs_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variable_costs_cost_id FOREIGN KEY ("cost_id") REFERENCES production_costs ("cost_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labor_costs" (
  "labor_cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each labor cost entry */,
  "variable_cost_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the variable cost entry */,
  "labor_type" TEXT /* Type of labor (e.g., Human Labor, Bullock Labor) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of labor */,
  "rate" REAL /* Rate per unit of labor */,
  "subtotal" REAL /* Subtotal cost for the labor */,
  "laborer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific laborer */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the labor cost entry */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments for the labor cost */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("labor_cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_labor_costs_variable_cost_id FOREIGN KEY ("variable_cost_id") REFERENCES variable_costs ("variable_cost_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machinery_costs" (
  "machinery_cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machinery cost entry */,
  "variable_cost_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the variable cost entry */,
  "machinery_type" TEXT /* Type of machinery used (e.g., Tractor) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of machinery use */,
  "rate" REAL /* Rate per unit of machinery use */,
  "subtotal" REAL /* Subtotal cost for the machinery use */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the operator of the machinery */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of maintenance for the machinery */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the machinery cost entry */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments for the machinery cost */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("machinery_cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_machinery_costs_variable_cost_id FOREIGN KEY ("variable_cost_id") REFERENCES variable_costs ("variable_cost_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit (e.g., Days, Hours) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate to a standard unit (e.g., hours to days) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production entry */,
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the overall cost entry */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the production activity */,
  "hectares" REAL /* Number of hectares involved in the production activity */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of crop */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments for the production entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_entries_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_entries_cost_id FOREIGN KEY ("cost_id") REFERENCES production_costs ("cost_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production analysis */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the production entry */,
  "average_cost" REAL /* Average cost of production per hectare */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments for the production analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_analysis_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_analysis_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES production_entries ("entry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., farmer, manager, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cost_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the cost data */,
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cost entry being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the cost data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the cost data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments for the access log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cost_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cost_access_logs_cost_id FOREIGN KEY ("cost_id") REFERENCES production_costs ("cost_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget entry */,
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the overall cost entry */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "estimated_cost" REAL /* Estimated cost for the forecasted period */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of crop */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments for the budget entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_cost_id FOREIGN KEY ("cost_id") REFERENCES production_costs ("cost_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the production entry */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of crop */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments for the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES production_entries ("entry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the report */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments for the report access log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., Summer, Winter) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments for the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)
